brand_identity.name: Passerelle
brand_identity.mission: Simplifier la coordination autour de l'enfant avec TSA pour les professionnels libéraux.

typography.instructions: Import 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' from Google Fonts. Use Outfit for all Headings (h1-h4) and DM Sans for body text.

colors.instructions: Add these custom colors to tailwind.config.js using CSS variables or hex values. Do NOT use default colors.

buttons.primary: bg-[#5D9B89] text-white hover:bg-[#4A8275] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E0F2EE] text-[#4A8275] hover:bg-[#D1E8E2] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all duration-200
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#E7E5E4] text-slate-600 hover:border-[#5D9B89] hover:text-[#5D9B89] bg-transparent rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-500 hover:text-[#5D9B89] hover:bg-[#F5F5F4] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E7E5E4] p-6 transition-all duration-300
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E7E5E4] p-6 hover:border-[#5D9B89]/30 hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] cursor-pointer transition-all duration-300 group
cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-slate-100 flex flex-col h-full

inputs.field: bg-[#F5F5F4] border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-[#5D9B89] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#5D9B89]/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-slate-700 placeholder:text-slate-400 transition-all duration-200 w-full outline-none
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2 ml-1

navigation.mobile_bottom: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-slate-100 p-4 flex justify-around items-center z-50 pb-safe
navigation.desktop_sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-100 p-6 flex flex-col z-40

status_badges.active: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-emerald-200
status_badges.pending: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-amber-200
status_badges.inactive: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border border-slate-200

professionals.description: Female therapist sitting in living room

children.description: Boy with colored powder on face

motion.instructions: Use framer-motion for complex layout transitions. Use tailwind-animate for simple entrances.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-slate-600+ on backgrounds. Use text-white ONLY on Primary Buttons.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44px x 44px for all interactive elements (mobile).

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors provided above. Set up font family.
3. LAYOUT: Create a Layout component that handles the Mobile Bottom Nav vs Desktop Sidebar responsive logic.
4. COMPONENTS: Build 'Card', 'Button', 'Badge', 'Avatar' components first using the styles defined.
5. DATA: Create a 'mockData.js' file using the image URLs provided to simulate the Professional's dashboard.
6. VIBE: Keep it soft. Avoid harsh borders (use border-slate-100 or border-stone-200). Use generous padding.
7. TESTING: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and cards.
8. DO NOT use gradients for text. Keep text readable and high contrast.
9. Use 'recharts' for any data visualization (activity summary) but style it with the brand palette.
10. For the Calendar/Planning view, use a clean grid layout or a library like 'react-big-calendar' or custom grid if simple.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids and negative space.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky navs.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
